steps.t: Ifing saw a curious figure to the north-west, atop the rising slope in that direction, before he collapsed. Ifing has asked you to search to the north…
A booted footprint north-west of Ifing's location, atop the rising slope, bears further investigation. Ifing was accosted by a hissing figure, and thi…
Ifing is waiting south-east of the booted footprint for you to report what you found.
